data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Ensures user account security by requiring multiple forms of verification.
data.technical_spec: Integrated with Azure Active Directory for identity validation.

data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Protects against sophisticated cyber threats and breaches.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Microsoft Defender and Azure Security Center.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures all sensitive data is encrypted in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption across data services and TLS 1.2 for data in transit.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts consistent security audits to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated and manual penetration testing protocols in place.

data.title: Zero Trust Architecture
data.description: Adopts a zero-trust model for verifying devices and users comprehensively.
data.technical_spec: No implicit trust, comprehensive verification required at each access attempt.
